<?php namespace Illuminate\View\Compilers\Concerns; use Illuminate\Support\Js; trait CompilesJs { /** * Compile the "@js" directive into valid PHP. * * @param string $expression * @return string */ protected function compileJs(string $expression) { return sprintf( "<?php echo \%s::from(%s)->toHtml() ?>", Js::class, $this->stripParentheses($expression) ); } }
